requirement_topic.en: Market Access — KEBS PVoC Certificate of Conformity + Standardization Mark / Import Standardization Mark (ISM)
requirement_topic.zh: 市场准入——KEBS PVoC符合性证书 + 标准化标志/进口标准化标志（ISM）
requirement_topic.zht: 市場准入——KEBS PVoC符合性證書 + 標準化標誌/進口標準化標誌（ISM）

summary.en: There is no single CE-style mark in Kenya; market access for a refrigerator rests on the KEBS conformity-assessment chain. (1) Pre-Export Verification of Conformity (PVoC): refrigerators are regulated products, so before shipment from China a KEBS-appointed PVoC agent verifies the goods against the applicable KS/IEC standards (safety, EMC, energy) and issues a Certificate of Conformity (CoC) for the consignment; the CoC is required for customs clearance at Mombasa, and goods arriving without a valid CoC face penalties, destination inspection, or rejection. PVoC offers Route A (consignment-by-consignment), Route B (product registration) and Route C (manufacturer licensing) — frequent exporters can register or license to streamline repeat shipments. (2) Standardization Mark (S-Mark) / Import Standardization Mark (ISM): the KEBS Standardization Mark is the local certification mark used by KEBS-permitted product; for imported regulated goods the Import Standardization Mark (ISM) is applied so the product can be identified as having met KEBS requirements on the local market. The appliance must also be rated for 240 V, 50 Hz and carry English-language markings and instructions.
summary.zh: 肯尼亚没有单一的CE式标志；电冰箱的市场准入依托KEBS合格评定链条。（1）出口前符合性验证（PVoC）：电冰箱属受管制产品，故自中国出货前由KEBS委派的PVoC代理机构依据适用KS/IEC标准（安全、电磁兼容、能效）核验货物，并为该批货物签发符合性证书（CoC）；CoC为蒙巴萨清关所必需，无有效CoC抵达的货物将面临罚款、目的地查验或退运。PVoC提供Route A（逐批）、Route B（产品注册）和Route C（制造商许可）——常出口商可注册或取得许可以简化重复出货。（2）标准化标志（S-Mark）/进口标准化标志（ISM）：KEBS标准化标志为KEBS许可产品使用的本地认证标志；对进口受管制货物，加贴进口标准化标志（ISM），以便在本地市场识别该产品已满足KEBS要求。器具还须按240 V、50 Hz额定并带英文标识及说明书。
summary.zht: 肯亞沒有單一的CE式標誌；電冰箱的市場准入依託KEBS合格評定鏈條。（1）出口前符合性驗證（PVoC）：電冰箱屬受管制產品，故自中國出貨前由KEBS委派的PVoC代理機構依據適用KS/IEC標準（安全、電磁相容、能效）核驗貨物，並為該批貨物簽發符合性證書（CoC）；CoC為蒙巴薩清關所必需，無有效CoC抵達的貨物將面臨罰款、目的地查驗或退運。PVoC提供Route A（逐批）、Route B（產品註冊）和Route C（製造商許可）——常出口商可註冊或取得許可以簡化重複出貨。（2）標準化標誌（S-Mark）/進口標準化標誌（ISM）：KEBS標準化標誌為KEBS許可產品使用的本地認證標誌；對進口受管制貨物，加貼進口標準化標誌（ISM），以便在本地市場識別該產品已滿足KEBS要求。器具還須按240 V、50 Hz額定並帶英文標識及說明書。

standards_or_laws: KEBS Pre-Export Verification of Conformity (PVoC) to Standards Programme — Route A (consignment), Route B (registration), Route C (licensing); per-consignment Certificate of Conformity (CoC)
Standards Act (Cap. 496, Laws of Kenya) — KEBS mandate and Standardization Mark (S-Mark) / Import Standardization Mark (ISM)
KS IEC 60335-2-24 / KS CISPR 14 / Kenyan refrigerator energy standard — the underlying KS/IEC standards verified under PVoC
Kenya Revenue Authority (KRA) customs clearance at Mombasa — CoC required for import entry

summary.en: In China, household refrigerating appliances require China Compulsory Certification (CCC) covering safety (GB 4706.13) and EMC (GB 4343.1) before sale, plus separate China Energy Label display (GB 12021.2). CCC is a mandatory third-party certification administered by CNCA-designated certification bodies; the CCC mark is affixed to certified products. There is no single CE-equivalent mark and, importantly, no per-consignment pre-export verification: CCC is a product/type certification valid for the model, not a per-shipment Certificate of Conformity. The Chinese CCC mark and China Energy Label are domestic marks and are not recognised by KEBS; they do not substitute for the PVoC CoC or the Kenyan ISM.
summary.zh: 在中国，家用制冷器具在销售前须取得涵盖安全（GB 4706.13）和电磁兼容（GB 4343.1）的中国强制认证（CCC），并须另行展示中国能效标识（GB 12021.2）。CCC为强制性第三方认证，由CNCA指定认证机构审核；CCC标志加贴于认证产品。中国没有单一等同CE的标志，且重要的是没有逐批出口前验证：CCC是对型号有效的产品/型式认证，而非按批的符合性证书。中国CCC标志和中国能效标识为国内标志，不被KEBS承认；不能替代PVoC CoC或肯尼亚ISM。
summary.zht: 在中國，家用製冷器具在銷售前須取得涵蓋安全（GB 4706.13）和電磁相容（GB 4343.1）的中國強制認證（CCC），並須另行展示中國能效標識（GB 12021.2）。CCC為強制性第三方認證，由CNCA指定認證機構審核；CCC標誌加貼於認證產品。中國沒有單一等同CE的標誌，且重要的是沒有逐批出口前驗證：CCC是對型號有效的產品/型式認證，而非按批的符合性證書。中國CCC標誌和中國能效標識為國內標誌，不被KEBS承認；不能替代PVoC CoC或肯亞ISM。

standards_or_laws: CCC (China Compulsory Certification) — safety (GB 4706.13) + EMC (GB 4343.1); mandatory; administered by CNCA/SAMR
China Energy Label — Measures for the Administration of Energy Efficiency Labels (NDRC/SAMR); based on GB 12021.2-2015

gap.en: The market-access mechanism is structurally different and CCC does not carry over: (1) Per-consignment CoC — unlike China's model-level CCC, Kenya requires a Certificate of Conformity for each shipment under PVoC; this is a recurring per-export action, not a one-time certificate, although Route B registration or Route C licensing can reduce per-consignment friction for repeat exporters; (2) KEBS does not accept the Chinese CCC certificate — conformity must be re-verified by a KEBS-appointed PVoC agent against the KS/IEC standards (IEC/CB test reports usually support this); (3) the Import Standardization Mark (ISM) must be applied so the product is recognised as KEBS-compliant on the Kenyan market — the CCC mark cannot serve this purpose; (4) practical localisation: 240 V rating and English markings/instructions. Exporters should engage a KEBS-appointed PVoC agent early and decide between Route A/B/C based on shipment frequency.
gap.zh: 市场准入机制结构不同，CCC不可沿用：（1）按批CoC——与中国型号级CCC不同，肯尼亚在PVoC下要求每批货物取得符合性证书；这是每次出口的重复性行为，而非一次性证书，但Route B注册或Route C许可可为常出口商减少按批阻力；（2）KEBS不接受中国CCC证书——须由KEBS委派的PVoC代理机构依据KS/IEC标准重新验证合格性（IEC/CB检测报告通常可支持）；（3）须加贴进口标准化标志（ISM），使产品在肯尼亚市场被识别为KEBS合规——CCC标志不能起此作用；（4）实务本地化：240 V额定及英文标识/说明书。出口商应尽早委聘KEBS委派的PVoC代理机构，并依出货频率在Route A/B/C间抉择。
gap.zht: 市場准入機制結構不同，CCC不可沿用：（1）按批CoC——與中國型號級CCC不同，肯亞在PVoC下要求每批貨物取得符合性證書；這是每次出口的重複性行為，而非一次性證書，但Route B註冊或Route C許可可為常出口商減少按批阻力；（2）KEBS不接受中國CCC證書——須由KEBS委派的PVoC代理機構依據KS/IEC標準重新驗證合格性（IEC/CB檢測報告通常可支持）；（3）須加貼進口標準化標誌（ISM），使產品在肯亞市場被識別為KEBS合規——CCC標誌不能起此作用；（4）實務本地化：240 V額定及英文標識/說明書。出口商應盡早委聘KEBS委派的PVoC代理機構，並依出貨頻率在Route A/B/C間抉擇。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — per-consignment KEBS PVoC Certificate of Conformity required for customs clearance at Mombasa; Import Standardization Mark (ISM) applied to imported regulated goods. No single CE-style mark; CCC is not recognised.
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — CCC certification (safety + EMC) + China Energy Label display required before sale in China; model-level certification, not per-shipment

source.publisher: Kenya Bureau of Standards (KEBS) — Pre-Export Verification of Conformity (PVoC) / Standardization Mark

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Kenya has no single CE-style mark — market access for refrigerators rests on a per-consignment KEBS PVoC Certificate of Conformity plus the Import Standardization Mark (ISM). Chinese CCC (a model-level certificate) is not recognised by KEBS and must be re-verified per shipment by a KEBS-appointed PVoC agent; IEC/CB test reports usually support this. Route B registration or Route C licensing can streamline repeat exports. Confirm 240 V rating, English markings, and the current PVoC requirements with the appointed agent.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 肯尼亚无单一CE式标志——电冰箱的市场准入依托按批的KEBS PVoC符合性证书及进口标准化标志（ISM）。中国CCC（型号级证书）不被KEBS承认，须由KEBS委派的PVoC代理机构按批重新验证；IEC/CB检测报告通常可支持。Route B注册或Route C许可可简化重复出口。请与所委派代理机构确认240 V额定、英文标识及现行PVoC要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 肯亞無單一CE式標誌——電冰箱的市場准入依託按批的KEBS PVoC符合性證書及進口標準化標誌（ISM）。中國CCC（型號級證書）不被KEBS承認，須由KEBS委派的PVoC代理機構按批重新驗證；IEC/CB檢測報告通常可支持。Route B註冊或Route C許可可簡化重複出口。請與所委派代理機構確認240 V額定、英文標識及現行PVoC要求。

requirement_topic.en: In-Country Importer — Kenyan Importer of Record for Customs Clearance and Local Responsibility
requirement_topic.zh: 境内进口商——办理清关及承担本地责任的肯尼亚进口商
requirement_topic.zht: 境內進口商——辦理清關及承擔本地責任的肯亞進口商

summary.en: Imports into Kenya require a Kenyan in-country importer / importer of record. The importer is the local economic operator that receives the consignment, presents it for customs clearance at the port of Mombasa, pays import duties and VAT, and is the responsible party towards KEBS and the Kenya Revenue Authority (KRA). The importer must be a registered Kenyan business with a Personal Identification Number (PIN) and is the entity named on the import documentation and the KEBS PVoC Certificate of Conformity. For practical purposes the PVoC CoC, the customs entry, and the ISM all link back to this in-country importer, who carries local-market responsibility for the goods. A foreign (Chinese) manufacturer cannot itself act as the importer of record into Kenya without a Kenyan-registered presence; goods are cleared in the name of the Kenyan importer/distributor.
summary.zh: 进口至肯尼亚须有肯尼亚境内进口商/进口记录人。进口商是接收货物、在蒙巴萨港办理清关、缴纳进口关税及增值税、并对KEBS和肯尼亚税务局（KRA）承担责任的本地经济运营商。进口商须为持有个人识别号（PIN）的肯尼亚注册企业，并是进口文件及KEBS PVoC符合性证书上载明的实体。实务上，PVoC CoC、海关申报及ISM均关联至该境内进口商，由其对货物承担本地市场责任。外国（中国）制造商若无肯尼亚注册主体，不能自行作为进口至肯尼亚的进口记录人；货物以肯尼亚进口商/经销商名义清关。
summary.zht: 進口至肯亞須有肯亞境內進口商/進口記錄人。進口商是接收貨物、在蒙巴薩港辦理清關、繳納進口關稅及增值稅、並對KEBS和肯亞稅務局（KRA）承擔責任的本地經濟運營商。進口商須為持有個人識別號（PIN）的肯亞註冊企業，並是進口文件及KEBS PVoC符合性證書上載明的實體。實務上，PVoC CoC、海關申報及ISM均關聯至該境內進口商，由其對貨物承擔本地市場責任。外國（中國）製造商若無肯亞註冊主體，不能自行作為進口至肯亞的進口記錄人；貨物以肯亞進口商/經銷商名義清關。

standards_or_laws: East African Community Customs Management Act (EACCMA) — import entry and clearance framework applicable in Kenya
Kenya Revenue Authority (KRA) — importer PIN registration, customs entry, duties and VAT at Mombasa
Standards Act (Cap. 496) + KEBS PVoC — importer named on the Certificate of Conformity and responsible for local-market conformity / ISM
Port of Mombasa — point of entry for clearance

summary.en: China has no direct regulatory equivalent obliging an export manufacturer to appoint a foreign-country responsible representative for product-compliance liability. For exports, Chinese manufacturers commercially appoint overseas distributors or trading companies, but there is no statutory China-side obligation analogous to a Kenyan importer-of-record being the named responsible economic operator on a conformity certificate. Under the domestic CCC regime, the certificate holder is responsible for domestic-market compliance — a role that does not extend to, and does not satisfy, Kenyan import and local-responsibility requirements.
summary.zh: 中国没有直接的监管等同规定，强制出口制造商为产品合规责任指定目的国责任代表。就出口而言，中国制造商以商业方式委任海外经销商或贸易公司，但中国侧不存在类似肯尼亚进口记录人作为合格证书上载明责任经济运营商的法定义务。在国内CCC制度下，证书持有人对国内市场合规负责——该角色不延伸至、亦不能满足肯尼亚的进口及本地责任要求。
summary.zht: 中國沒有直接的監管等同規定，強制出口製造商為產品合規責任指定目的國責任代表。就出口而言，中國製造商以商業方式委任海外經銷商或貿易公司，但中國側不存在類似肯亞進口記錄人作為合格證書上載明責任經濟運營商的法定義務。在國內CCC制度下，證書持有人對國內市場合規負責——該角色不延伸至、亦不能滿足肯亞的進口及本地責任要求。

standards_or_laws: N/A — no direct Chinese regulatory equivalent for the Kenyan importer-of-record / local-responsibility obligation

gap.en: This is a structural gap with no Chinese regulatory analogue. A Chinese refrigerator manufacturer cannot ship to Kenya on its own account without a Kenyan importer of record: (1) the goods must be consigned to a Kenyan-registered importer holding a KRA PIN, who clears them at Mombasa and pays duties/VAT; (2) that importer is the entity named on the PVoC Certificate of Conformity and carries local-market responsibility, including for ISM-marked conformity; (3) unlike the EU Authorised Representative model (which a manufacturer can appoint while remaining the responsible party), Kenya's structure runs through a conventional importer/distributor who takes title and clears the goods — so the exporter must secure a reliable Kenyan partner before shipping. Without this in-country importer, the consignment cannot legally clear customs regardless of PVoC status.
gap.zh: 这是一个在中国监管体系中没有类似规定的结构性差距。中国电冰箱制造商若无肯尼亚进口记录人，不能以自身名义向肯尼亚发货：（1）货物须发往持有KRA PIN的肯尼亚注册进口商，由其在蒙巴萨清关并缴纳关税/增值税；（2）该进口商是PVoC符合性证书上载明的实体，承担本地市场责任，包括ISM标志合规；（3）与欧盟授权代表模式（制造商可委任代表而自身仍为责任方）不同，肯尼亚的结构经由取得货权并清关的常规进口商/经销商运作——故出口商须在发货前确定可靠的肯尼亚合作伙伴。若无此境内进口商，无论PVoC状态如何，货物均不能合法清关。
gap.zht: 這是一個在中國監管體系中沒有類似規定的結構性差距。中國電冰箱製造商若無肯亞進口記錄人，不能以自身名義向肯亞發貨：（1）貨物須發往持有KRA PIN的肯亞註冊進口商，由其在蒙巴薩清關並繳納關稅/增值稅；（2）該進口商是PVoC符合性證書上載明的實體，承擔本地市場責任，包括ISM標誌合規；（3）與歐盟授權代表模式（製造商可委任代表而自身仍為責任方）不同，肯亞的結構經由取得貨權並清關的常規進口商/經銷商運作——故出口商須在發貨前確定可靠的肯亞合作夥伴。若無此境內進口商，無論PVoC狀態如何，貨物均不能合法清關。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — a Kenyan in-country importer (KRA PIN holder) is required to clear the consignment at Mombasa and is named on the PVoC Certificate of Conformity; the foreign manufacturer cannot be the importer of record without a Kenyan-registered presence
mandatory_status.cn: No equivalent requirement — Chinese export manufacturers have no statutory obligation under Chinese law to appoint a foreign importer of record

source.publisher: Kenya Revenue Authority (KRA) — Importation / customs clearance; KEBS for PVoC importer naming

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] A Kenyan in-country importer of record (KRA PIN holder) is mandatory to clear a refrigerator consignment at Mombasa and is the responsible party named on the PVoC Certificate of Conformity and for ISM-marked local conformity. This has no Chinese regulatory analogue and is structurally unlike the EU Authorised Representative model — Kenya runs through a conventional importer/distributor who takes title. A Chinese manufacturer must secure a reliable Kenyan importer before shipping; without one, goods cannot legally clear customs.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 肯尼亚境内进口记录人（KRA PIN持有人）为在蒙巴萨清关电冰箱货物所必需，并是PVoC符合性证书上载明的责任方及ISM本地合规责任方。这在中国监管中无类似规定，且结构上不同于欧盟授权代表模式——肯尼亚经由取得货权的常规进口商/经销商运作。中国制造商须在发货前确定可靠的肯尼亚进口商；若无，则货物不能合法清关。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 肯亞境內進口記錄人（KRA PIN持有人）為在蒙巴薩清關電冰箱貨物所必需，並是PVoC符合性證書上載明的責任方及ISM本地合規責任方。這在中國監管中無類似規定，且結構上不同於歐盟授權代表模式——肯亞經由取得貨權的常規進口商/經銷商運作。中國製造商須在發貨前確定可靠的肯亞進口商；若無，則貨物不能合法清關。
